corrections.text: The article states the paper was published in Physical Review Letters 'as an Editor's Suggestion and cover article.' This specific designation is not confirmed in the available source snapshots: the arxiv preprint (source-0) does not mention it, and ScienceDaily and Interesting Engineering describe the paper only as 'published in Physical Review Letters.' The phys.org source (source-2) returned HTTP 403 and could not be archived; it may have contained the designation. The core factual claims — 4 fJ switching benchmark, MoSe₂/silicon nitride platform, PRL publication — are fully verified. The 'Editor's Suggestion' qualifier could not be independently confirmed from archived sources.
